{{Quote|Berl joined the Rebellion to bring freedom to the galaxy and I think he'd be happy knowing that he died on a mission that succeeded, in its own small way, in doing just that.|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="marvel64" />}}
'''Berl''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who flew an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] under the command of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Some time after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Berl and fellow Rebel pilot [[Cinda Tarheel/Legends|Cinda Tarheel]] attended Skywalker as wing-men on a mission to the planet [[Serphidi/Legends|Serphidi]]. Rebel Intelligence had learned that the [[Serp]]hidian monarch, King [[S'Shah]], had been engaging in talks with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The Rebels' mission was to oust King S'Shah before the Imperials could establish a permanent foothold on Serphidi. Moments after landing their fighters, the pilots came upon several [[Serp]] warriors armed with lances, riding atop lizard-mounts, and Berl was killed in the ensuing confrontation.<ref name="marvel64" />

==Behind the scenes==
Berl appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 64|''Star Wars'' (1977) 64]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and [[Michael Fleisher]], illustrated by [[Joe Brozowski]] and released in [[1982]].<ref name="marvel64" />
